description: Configure a 2x2 Four-Up layout with linked views to display the pre-loaded BraTS MRI sequences: FLAIR (top-left), T1 (top-right), T1_Contrast (bottom-left), and T2 (bottom-right). Locate the tumor and place a fiducial at its center. Export a screenshot to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/multisequence_comparison.png, the fiducial to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/tumor_center.fcsv, and a report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/sequence_comparison_report.json. The report must include the fields: case_id, slice_position_mm, tumor_center_ras, sequence_assessment, and estimated_tumor_size_mm.
